PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career.

FormerTeam.description: Player's former team in abbreviated format [Key] (e.g. SD; PHI; LAD; ATL etc.)

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

Type.description: Type of Transaction. Released, Waived, Signed, Promoted, Elevated, Demoted, and Traded.

Date.description: The date that this transaction took place

Note.description: A summary of the transaction (e.g. "Harris has signed with the Diamondbacks.")

Created.description: The date and time this transaction was created in US Eastern Time

Updated.description: The date and time of the last update made to this transaction (in US Eastern Time)
